Silver key sunlight is apparently a card you can get on triggering death resist in d-tide but the card itself is a 0 cost one time use, meaning that once you use it, it's deleted from your deck, that allows you to pick one of three random unlocked posse to trigger twice
Compared to halm, what does 24 do? Like only give specific buff depends on the team realm?
She's actually more damage focused than support
In chaos she serves only as a dps focused mainly around using her exalt
In other realms she has a little stuff to support as well for example depressive state exalt in aequor creates a tentacle or in ultra where her exalt has effects related to retaliate
Her rouse card effects change depending on the realm too
The effects are all different so just click on it when you're viewing her skills cause I forgot specifically what she does in each realm
Just aequor and chaos I remember for aequor her exalt can now trigger 50% of poison applied to enemies and all of her damage applies 10% of damage dealt as poison
Think it had tentacle damage bonus stuff as well
Chaos is more straightforward just gives her crit rate and crit damage and each time you use posse her exalt does more and more damage for each use

Chaos : Every 1 RM, all awaker gains 0.05 after using Posse.
Aequor : Every 1 RM, 0.5% chance tentacle to attack once at turn end after Exalt. Over 100% chance allows multiple attacks.
Caro : Every 1 RM, after devour gains 0.02% max HP and 0.01% temp Power (scales with lost HP, up to 2x)
Ultra : Every 1 RM, 0.25% chance to gain 1 "Inspiration" at turn start. Over 100% chance allows multiple gains.

"We once reworked and weakened some important mechanics in Daphadel in V1.1, and the rework of Painfin in V1.2 rendered some stack counterplay no longer viable. Now, our understanding and standards for the game's balance design have changed significantly, and the overall inclusiveness of the game environment is completely different from back then. It is no longer necessary to revisit these two adjustments that have brought great pain to everyone—yes, the facts have proven that we were wrong! We are truly, truly sorry!

After careful discussion, we have decided to revert these two weakened parts as much as possible in the update of V1.6.2.2 on September 27, while fully retaining the enhancements made during the reworks! To express our sincere apologies, we will also resend the previous adjustment benefits and compensations to all Keepers: Daphadel: Luminescent Core x10, Pristine Core x10, Rotating Tome x1, Original Paradise x1, Special Approval Potion x10, Time Origin x5 (valid until October 21), Painfin: Silver Core x1000.

The community of Forgotten Night is continuously growing, and we feel honored. We sincerely thank everyone for their companionship and support, and wish you all a fun gaming experience!

[Daphadel]
Decapitating Strike: When Daphadel kills an enemy in any way, the base damage of "Decapitating Strike" will now permanently increase by 25% in this level, up from 20%. Additionally, this enhancement no longer has a 100% cap.
Spirit Initiation 2 - Greedy Mist: The limit of 5 stacks has been removed; it can now stack infinitely.

[Painfin]
New Effect: When the bearer performs a "Defense," they will also gain a counterattack equal to 11/14/17/20% of their defense."
